title: Per-task mechanical checks
description: Structured, runnable form of expected.md's 'Mechanical checks' section. The runner executes each check after the harness completes and folds per-check results into the runner_result. expected.md remains the human-readable narrative; this file is what the runner consumes.

name.description: Human-readable label, surfaced in runner output.

command.description: Shell command run in the fixture tempdir. Mutually exclusive with file_unchanged.

file_unchanged.description: Relative path under fixture/ that must be byte-equal to its starting state. Mutually exclusive with command.

expect.description: For command-style checks: assertions on the command's outcome. At least one assertion must be present.

exit_code_ne.description: Exit code must NOT equal this value.
